svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="mem-map" name="MCU Memory Map"> <mxGraphModel dx="-415" dy="-148" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="800" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="MCU Memory Map (STM32U575)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="150" y="10" width="500" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flash_title" value="Flash (2 MB)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="50" width="250" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f1" value="Firmware (.text, .rodata)
0x0800_0000 – 0x0802_FFFF
192 KB" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="80" width="250" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f2" value="Config Sector (CRC protected)
0x0803_0000 – 0x0803_0FFF
4 KB" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="140" width="250" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f3" value="Reserved / Future OTA
0x0803_1000 – 0x081F_FFFF
~1.8 MB" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;dashed=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="195" width="250" height="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ram_title" value="RAM (786 KB SRAM)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="50" width="300" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" value="Stack
0x2000_0000 – 0x2000_7FFF
32 KB" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="80" width="300" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" value="BSS + Data (static variables)
0x2000_8000 – 0x2001_FFFF
96 KB" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="130" width="300" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" value="lwIP Buffers (static pool)
0x2002_0000 – 0x2003_FFFF
128 KB" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="180" width="300" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4" value="Application Buffers (available)
0x2004_0000 – 0x200C_3FFF
530 KB" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;shadow=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="230" width="300" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="buf_title" value="Static Buffer Allocation" style="text;html=1;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="290" width="660" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="buf_hdr" value="Buffer" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#333333;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="320" width="200" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="buf_hdr2" value="Size" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#333333;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="320" width="80" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="buf_hdr3" value="Purpose" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#333333;fontColor=#FFFFFF;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="320" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="345" width="380" height="22" width="200" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2s" value="512 B" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="367" width="80" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2p" value="Outgoing wire frame" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="367" width="380" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" value="rx_frame_buffer" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="389" width="200" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3s" value="512 B" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="389" width="80" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3p" value="Incoming wire frame" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="389" width="380" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4" value="protobuf_encode/decode_buf" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="411" width="200" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4s" value="512 B" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="411" width="80" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4p" value="nanopb encode + decode workspace" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="411" width="380" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b5" value="lwip_memp_pool" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="433" width="200" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b5s" value="128 KB" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="433" width="80" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b5p" value="lwIP memory pool (static)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#deebf7;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="433" width="380" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b6" value="config_cache + sensor_readings" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="60" y="455" width="200" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b6s" value="192 B" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="455" width="80" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b6p" value="Current config in RAM + latest readings" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="340" y="455" width="380" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="margin_note" value="Flash margin: 91% free | RAM margin: 88% free" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#82b366;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="150" y="495" width="500" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
